Exposes AddToScheme.\n- sg-evals/kubernetes--v1.32.0 pkg/apis/core/register.go: same for the internal version.\n- sg-evals/kubernetes--v1.32.0 pkg/apis/core/v1/register.go: delegates to the api/core/v1 SchemeBuilder.\n- sg-evals/kubernetes--v1.32.0 pkg/apis/core/install/install.go: Install() function calls both core.AddToScheme (internal) and v1.AddToScheme (versioned) on the legacyscheme.Scheme, and sets the version priority."
}
